docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-09-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RE/SEARCH (VALE VALE - OWNER)
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-05-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-05-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: BRAD KAPLAN. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LUCAS, MICHAEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RE/SEARCH (VALE VALE - OWNER) $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $75.00, THE COURT FINDS THAT PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT HAD A CONTRACT TO SLPIT THE PROFIT (INCOME LESS EXPENSES) RELATED TO PLAINTIFF'S BOOK SALES, BUT THAT THE SALES DID NOT GENERATE A PROFIT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM BRAD KAPLAN FILED BY LUCAS, MICHAEL RE/SEARCH (VALE VALE - OWNER)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT RE/SEARCH (VALE VALE - OWNER)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED FEB-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY LUCAS, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT RE/SEARCH (VALE VALE - OWNER) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-05-2009 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-05-2009 - JUDGMENT.
